message:
feat(tui): wire dashboard subsystem into TUI refresh loop and QueryClient (ft-3hbv9)

- Add dashboard_state() call to App::refresh_data() so ViewState.dashboard
  gets populated from the QueryClient on each refresh cycle
- Add dashboard_manager field to ProductionQueryClient with
  set_dashboard_manager() setter for shared Arc<Mutex<DashboardManager>>
- Implement dashboard_state() on ProductionQueryClient to lock and snapshot
  the shared DashboardManager when available
- Add 3 integration tests: refresh populates dashboard, None when
  unavailable, dashboard panels render after refresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
